class.name: MultiNode3D
class.brief_description: Base class for spatial MultiNode children. Adds a transform offset applied to each instance.
class.description: MultiNode3D extends MultiNodeSub with spatial awareness. It provides a configurable transform offset (position, rotation, scale) that is applied to every instance, and a flag to control whether instance rotation/scale is inherited. All concrete spatial sub-nodes (Mesh, Collider, Audio, etc.) inherit from this class. Requires the parent MultiNode to have use_transforms enabled.

members.member: Position offset applied to every instance, in local space. Use this to shift child geometry relative to the instance origin — for example, raising a label above a character's head.
Rotation offset applied to every instance, in radians (displayed as degrees in the inspector). Combines with offset_position and offset_scale to form the transform offset.
Scale offset applied to every instance. Multiplied into the transform offset along with position and rotation.

When enabled, each instance inherits the rotation and scale from its parent transform. When disabled, only the position is used — useful for labels, lights, and other elements that should stay upright regardless of instance orientation.

method.name: get_transform_offset
method.description: Returns the combined transform offset built from offset_position, offset_rotation, and offset_scale.

method.name: compute_instance_transform
method.description: Compute the final transform for an instance by applying the offset and use_instance_basis flag to the given instance transform. Used internally by all spatial sub-nodes.
